productDisplayName: Aneri Women N Jashn Purple Kurta
description: Composition Purple kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, bead and sequin yoke, three-quarter sleeves with lace detailing along the hems, georgette lining and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurti from aneri. The flowy georgette fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the embellished yoke heightens the fashion statement of this kurta. Team it with churidars, chunky accessories and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
